notes: TUNNEL removed; replaced with three competitive modes: CAPTURE THE PULSE (hold orb 1pt/sec, drops on damage, first to 30 wins), PAINT WAR (each kill paints a splotch on the floor, more area at song end wins), SHRINKING ZONE (battle-royale ring drifts + shrinks, 7 dps outside, kills decide). 4 modes total on PLAY (ARENA / CAPTURE / PAINT / ZONE). Per-mode HUD score and win condition.
launcher_notes: Always-visible safety-net footer link to pulsewavegame.com so users have a one-click escape hatch if self-update ever breaks. Reliable Windows self-update (copy+del, Defender-friendly) carried forward from v0.1.9 with verbose log at %TEMP%\pulsewave_launcher_update.log.
